entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "Egin iezadazu hasteko lagunduko didan galdera bat."

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "Ez eman azken erantzuna oraindik. Galdetu zer iruditzen zaidan lehen urratsa."

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "Azaldu zergatik funtzionatzen duen urrats honek."

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "Eman pista bat, ez azken erantzuna."

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "Eman antzeko problema bat hau ebatzi ondoren."

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "Hona nire erantzuna. Zer uste oker erakusten du?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "Hona nire saiakera. Zein da lagunduko lidakeen pista txikiena?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "Egin antzeko praktika-ariketa bat honen ondoren."

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "Egin nazazu ideia berriro azaltzera jarraitu aurretik."

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "Egin galdetegi bat gai honi buruz eta itxaron nire erantzuna."

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "Zein uste okerrek eramango luke norbait nire erantzun okerrera?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: Proba sinplea

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: Ikasketa-ziklo sendo batek honela dirudi:

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: AIak azkarrago ikasten lagun diezazuke. Ikastea erabat saihesten ere lagun diezazuke.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI tutorea

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Eskatu pista bat. Ez eskatu azken erantzuna oraindik.

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: Eskatu pista txiki bat.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Eskatu AIari urrats hori egiaztatzeko.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: Ikasketa-saio baten amaieran, egin hiru galdera zeure buruari:

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Saiatu lehenik. Eman hiru minutu AI gabe saiatzen.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: Saihestu kopia-tranpa

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: Eraiki ziklo bat

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: Adibide berri bat egin dezaket?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: Ideia azal dezaket begiratu gabe?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-lan desberdinek fluxu desberdinak behar dituzte. Erabili etxeko lanen coach bat pistetarako, matematikako urrats-coach bat problemak ebazteko, tutore sokratiko bat ulermen sakonerako, ikasketa-txartelak gogoratzeko eta galdetegiak presiopeko praktikarako.

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Badakit hurrena zer praktikatu?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: Azaldu zure mugimendua. Esan AIari zergatik aukeratu duzun hurrengo urratsa.

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: Konpondu uste okerra.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Idazketan, horrek esan nahi du Writing Coach erabiltzea tesia, egitura edo paragrafoa hobetzeko zure ahotsa mantenduz. Kodean, Code Tutor erabiltzea esan nahi du erroreak azaltzeko, irteera aurreikusteko eskatzen dizun eta konponbide oso bat itsatsi beharrean arazten laguntzen dizun moduan. Azterketetan, Exam Prep Planner erabiltzea esan nahi du zer berrikusi lehenik eta nola probatu zeure burua erabakitzeko.

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: Ikasketa zintzorako prompt onak

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: Hona berrerabil dezakezun bertsio pixka bat sendoagoa:

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: Nola ikasi AIarekin zeure buruari tranparik egin gabe

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Erantzuna bai bada, AIak ikasten lagundu dizu. Erantzuna ez bada, hurrengo mugimendua ez da gehiago irakurtzea. Praktika aktiboa da. Ireki Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction edo AI ikaskuntza-prompten liburutegia, eta bihurtu gaia saiatu beharreko zeregin batean.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Lana etxeko lana bada, hasi Homework Coach-en. Matematika bada, erabili Math Step Coach eta eskatu urrats bakoitza banan-banan egiaztatzeko. Kontzeptu bat sakon ulertu nahi baduzu, erabili Socratic Instruction eta erantzun galderei laburpena eskatu aurretik.

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Etxeko lanetako galdera bat itsatsi eta azken erantzuna kopiatzen baduzu, agian zeregina amaituko duzu, baina ez duzu trebetasuna eraiki. Pista bat eskatzen baduzu, zure pentsamendua azaltzen baduzu, zure erantzuna konparatzen baduzu eta antzeko problema bat saiatzen baduzu, AIa ikasketa-lagun bihurtzen da, ez lasterbide.

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: Praktikatu bertsio berri bat.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Praktikatu transferentzia. Eskatu antzeko problema bat zenbaki, formulazio edo testuinguru desberdinekin.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Gogoratu geroago. Bihurtu puntu ahula txartel batean Flashcard Builder-en edo galdetegi labur batean Quiz Me On Trivia-n.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Eskatu diagnostikoa. Galdetu zure erantzunak zure ulermenari buruz zer erakusten duen.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ikasketa-trebetasunak

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: AIarekin ikasteak ondoen funtzionatzen du tresnak zu gidariaren eserlekuan mantentzen zaituenean.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Hori abisu-seinalea da. Ezagutzea ez da gogoratzea. Azalpen argi bat irakurtzea ez da problema berri bat ebatzi, paragrafo bat idatzi edo presiopean galdera bati erantzuteko gai izatea.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Ziklo hori kopiatzea baino motelagoa da, baina nahastuta geratzea baino askoz azkarragoa.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Kopia-tranpa sotila da. Ez da beti tranpa egitea bezala sentitzen. Batzuetan eraginkorra izatea bezala sentitzen da. AIak zerbait ederki azaltzen du, zuk baietz egiten duzu, eta aurrera egiten duzu. Hamar minutu geroago ezin duzu ideia erantzuna aurrean izan gabe berriro sortu.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: Aldea nola erabiltzen duzun da.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: Galdera ez da AIak ikasketaren parte izan behar duen ala ez. Ikasle askorentzat dagoeneko bada. Galdera hobea da tresnak memoria, epaiketa eta konfiantza eraikitzen laguntzen dizun, edo ikaskuntza itsatsarazten duen borroka bera isil-isilik kentzen ari den.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: Transferentzia-urratsa da gakoa. AIak azaldu berri duen problema zehatza bakarrik ebatzi badezakezu, adibidea ikasi duzu. Problemaren senide bat ebatzi badezakezu, ideia ikasten hasia zara.

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: Hauek ez dira hitz magikoak. Babes-mugak dira. Elkarrizketa pentsamenduan fokuratuta mantentzen dute, erantzun-bilketan ordez.

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: Prompt hauek aktibo mantentzen zaituzte. AIak zure arrazoiketa babestea eragiten dute, ordezkatu beharrean.

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: Probatu honelako promptak:

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: Saiatu problema zeuk.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Erabili AI ulermenerako, praktikarako eta feedbackerako coach gisa, ikaskuntza isil-isilik kentzen duen lasterbide gisa ordez.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Erabili AI erantzunaren inguruko pentsamendurako

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: Erabili AIa moteltzera bultzatzen duten promptak:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: Erabili modu egokia

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Erabili arau hau: AI azalpen bakoitzaren ondoren, itxi zikloa zure burutik ateratako output batekin. Idatzi ideia berriro. Ebatzi bertsio berri bat. Egin ikasketa-txartel bat. Irakatsi ikasle gazte imaginario bati. Eskatu galdetegi bat. Saioak zenbat eta gehiago eskatzen dizun ekoiztea, orduan eta zailagoa da zeure burua engainatzea.

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: Idatzi zure hurrengo urratsa.
